localizations.title: The Awakening of the Mummy
localizations.hint_2: The boulder can create an exit. Use it.
localizations.hint_4: Sarah Jones knows of a passage to enter the pyramid.
localizations.hint_7: The passage cannot be far from the entrance to the pyramid.
localizations.hint_8_first: The burial chamber is shrouded in darkness. You need to light the other side of the room. The braziers are too heavy to move, but may still prove helpful.
localizations.hint_8: You need a torch to light the back of the room.
localizations.hint_10: A staff… What can you combine it with?
localizations.hint_15: Whatever you stumbled over is in semi-darkness. What can you use to see more clearly?
localizations.hint_17: The tablet holds a code. It can probably be combined with other things.
localizations.hint_19_first: You take the bandages. They will eventually come in handy!
localizations.hint_19: Move the thick right wall toward the center to simulate the movement of the walls.
localizations.hint_29: This can be used as a torch.
localizations.hint_37: This torch might light the dark areas.
localizations.hint_45: During your conversation with Sarah Jones, you hear a whisper. Increase the volume on your device.
localizations.hint_55: You have gone thirty feet too far. You must back up.
localizations.hint_74_first: The tablet (17) and one of the cartouches of card 52 will be helpful.
localizations.hint_74: The cartouche you are looking for is reproduced on all of the cards.
localizations.hint_81_first: This layout reminds you of the entrance to the pyramid.
localizations.hint_81: Even though the statues of the pharaohs in front of the entrance to the pyramid remind you of the effigies carved into the door, three of them seem different.
localizations.hint_91: You've found your friend! What does she want to tell you?
localizations.hint_93_first: The door is too strong. You will have to aim at a specific spot.
localizations.hint_93: Card 94 represents the same door seen from the outside. Look for a clue there.
localizations.hint_94_first: The scarab beetle symbolized rebirth to the ancient Egyptians.
localizations.hint_94: This symbol is found on both sides of the entrance doors to the pyramids.
localizations.hint_95_first: Follow the voice and you will be able to orient yourself in the labyrinth.
localizations.hint_95: Construct the entire labyrinth to find a path. Follow the slabs.
localizations.hint_99: A scarab beetle is interfering with your inspection. Try to scare it off...
localizations.answer_hint_2: Use the slope (91) so that the boulder gains speed and power.
localizations.answer_hint_4: Sarah Jones (7) leads you to a passage that goes deeper into the Red Pyramid (4).
localizations.answer_hint_7: Sarah Jones (7) leads you to a passage that goes deeper into the Red Pyramid (4).
localizations.answer_hint_8: To light the torch (29), dip it into the brazier (8).
localizations.answer_hint_10: Wrap the bandages (19) around the staff's tip (10) to create a makeshift torch.
localizations.answer_hint_15: Bring your torch (37) closer to the ground (15) to light the area where you stumbled.
localizations.answer_hint_17: By combining the information from the tablet (17) and cartouches (52), you notice that the cartouche with the scarab beetle (which is also reproduced on all the cards) indicates which combination to use to unlock the mechanism (74).
localizations.answer_hint_19: Wrap the bandages (19) around the staff's tip (10) to create a makeshift torch. To find the secret room within the labyrinth (C, R, 95), take the card on the far right and slide it toward the center, overlapping the other two. You will see the number 8 take shape.
localizations.answer_hint_29: To light the torch (29), dip it into the brazier (8).
localizations.answer_hint_37: With your torch (37), light the dark area of the burial chamber by adding it to modifier +62 and reveal the sarcophagus (99). There is another place where you can use your torch (37), where you stumbled (15) to pick up the cartouches (52).
localizations.answer_hint_45: The whisper is asking you to take card 55.
localizations.answer_hint_74: By combining the information from the tablet (17) and cartouches (52), you notice that the cartouche with the scarab beetle (which is also reproduced on all the cards) indicates which combination to use to unlock the mechanism (74).
localizations.answer_hint_81: You notice that an element is missing from three of the statues (4): the left arm from the one in the background on the right; the right leg from the one in the background on the left; and the nose from the one in the foreground on the left. Access the machine and select the parts missing from the statues on the pharaohs' representations.
localizations.answer_hint_91: You just bumped into Sarah. Press the dedicated button to talk to her. (You can now talk whenever she is with you - just press her button.)
localizations.answer_hint_93: When looking at the entrance door (94), you see a large crack on the right wall. Knowing that the door you are standing in front of (93) corresponds to the entrance door, but from the inside, you must aim to the left of the door to destroy the weakened wall.
localizations.answer_hint_94: This door is reminiscent of door 93.
localizations.answer_hint_95: Construct the labyrinth to see the number 19 take shape.
localizations.answer_hint_99: To escape, use the labyrinth (C, R, and 95). Follow the machine's instructions.
localizations.machine_74: Be careful; a boulder is rolling in your direction!
localizations.machine_81: You begin exploring the labyrinth while Sarah Jones is exploring another chamber.
localizations.scream_warning: Some scenes may be too frightening for young children. Are there sensitive souls among you?
localizations.audio_warning: For greater immersion in this adventure, we recommend you play with the volume on.
localizations.button_machine_false: No conversation with Sarah Jones is available with this card.
localizations.sarah_45: What do you wish to know?
localizations.sarah_45_player_1: What do you know about the pyramid?
localizations.sarah_45_player_2: I would like to talk about the mummy.
localizations.sarah_45_player_3: Doesn't he appear in the burial chamber?
localizations.sarah_45_answer_1: The Red Pyramid is the third largest pyramid in Egypt and represents the first successful attempt at a smooth-sided pyramid. It is attributed to Snefru, the first king of the 4th dynasty.
localizations.sarah_45_answer_2: Several people claim to have seen a mummy wandering the corridors… According to them, he revealed himself next to the servants' chamber. I believe we must head in that direction.
localizations.sarah_45_answer_3: No, the burial chamber with the sarcophagus has not yet been found...
localizations.sarah_91: Ah, At last! I've found you.
localizations.sarah_91_player_2: The… the… the… mummy, he… he… is alive… He is right behind… he chased me. Can you hear him?
localizations.sarah_91_answer_1: I've found a chamber with some amphoras, but nothing of interest. You were no longer there when I came back. When I entered the labyrinth, the door closed behind me. We're stuck in the pyramid.
localizations.sarah_91_answer_3: I hear nothing but the wind. Get a grip on yourself! You were probably just hallucincating. Surely you don't believe this nonsense, do you? Let's try finding an exit now! I don't want to spend the rest of my life in here, and you don't either, I trust. Let's keep walking down this slope.
localizations.hint_labyrinth: You can reassemble cards C, R, and 95 to see the number 19. It will help you escape from the labyrinth.
localizations.machine_93_intro: With effort, you push the boulder up the slope. Hold your device and press the boulder to release it.
localizations.machine_93_help: The door is much too strong. You must find a weak point.
localizations.machine_99_labyrinth_start: Here is what you see. How do you get back?
localizations.machine_93: As you escape into the open air, you move as far away as possible from the pyramid and catch your breath. You then turn your face toward the sun, letting its warmth comfort you, driving away the horrible terror that caused you to sweat, drenching you from head to toe. This whole ordeal was nothing short of a nightmare. Your colleague, Sarah Jones, does not believe a word of your story and thinks you, and all the other explorers, must have been hallucinating. However, she is willing to come back with you, and plans on bringing more equipment to expose whatever trickery is going on. Are you ready to face the mummy once more? Can you still trust Sarah Jones? After all, the mummy only showed up when Sarah was elsewhere, and he vanished before you rejoined the professor. But don't despair! Next time around, Sarah Jones will remain by your side the entire time.
localizations.machine_99_flee:
The walls move again! To escape from the mummy, you run toward what seems to be the labyrinth's exit. Unfortunately, you find yourself at a dead-end. You have no choice but to retrace your steps… 
 Return the labyrinth back to its initial state, then close this window.
